Author: XeldarAlz
Name: PVP Auto LB
Description: Fires your PvP Limit Break for you when an enemy's HP drops below a configurable threshold.
Punchline: Your PvP Limit Break, fired for you.

Author: XeldarAlz
Name: Doman Mahjong Solver
Description: Reads your Doman Mahjong hand and either suggests the best discard or plays the match for you.
Changelog: v0.1.1.1 — Two stuck-state fixes that should clear the most common Auto-play freezes. (1) After a pon/chi the addon parks the claimed tile at slot 13 with slots [10..12] zeroed; the prior reader stopped at the first zero, reported a 10-tile hand instead of 11, and the discard gate refused to fire. The hand-array scan now walks the full array and the post-call discard goes through. (2) The chi-variant-select sub-popup needs FireCallback opcode 12, not the opcode-11 button-row path the rest of the call prompts use — the previous build dispatched [11, 0] three times into silent no-ops and froze at state-30. Also: multi-chi variant selection now scores each tile-triple by post-call shanten and picks the lowest, instead of always taking the leftmost button. Doman akadora aliases handled correctly across the migration. AboutWindow redesigned (centered icon, shimmer greeting). New compatibility-report issue template to grow the JP / OC / NA client matrix.

Author: XeldarAlz
Name: Auto Daily Tribes
Description: Does your daily allied tribe quests for you: tick the tribes, the plugin handles the rest.
Punchline: Daily allied tribe quests, done for you.
